text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day before training, I make my way to the
track a little early and am greeted by a vigorous
voice.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: C'mon, keep running! Work those legs!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant! Were you watching?! I got a new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Haha, see what I mean? Focus on moving your
legs, and keep your strides short and crisp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli is doling out running advice to a
large group of students, looking just as reliable as
any instructor. However...

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! It's Sirius and her crew of hoodlums!

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What do we do? We can't train while they're
here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look around to find worried faces on
everyone not currently on the track. I wonder
what the issue is...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: May I have a word with you, Sirius?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The student council has received multiple
complaints that you and your friends are unfairly
monopolizing the track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As such, we request that you vacate the premises
so the other students can train undisturbed.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Nah.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at their faces... You understand,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
They've only broken curfew or some academy
rules, but you lot have got them so busy writing
lines or reflection papers all the time that they've
got no time to train properly.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So it's on me to look after them and give them a
time and place to train.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. But ultimately, it is still because they've
broken the rules. It would be difficult to maintain
the academy if we didn't enforce the rules.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying that it's fine to throw these girls
aside over some silly little rules?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah. Sorry, but no way I can agree with that.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
There's a waiting list for everything at this
academy, and breaking just one rule is all it takes
to get pushed back on the list.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Even if the circumstances that led to the rule
being broken were completely out of their hands,
it's all the same to you.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It seems to me that the academy's "rule" is to
ignore any and all personal circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If we play by the book, these girls are all goners.
Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, that's—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and one more thing. You said people were
complaining to the student council, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So where's the Emperor herself? If this is so
important, why isn't she gracing us with her
presence?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. Give her a message for me. Tell her if
she's just gonna sit on that throne all day judging
us from afar, we've got no time to listen to her
either.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
All right, folks, let's get back to it! Get running!
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli is already back to doling out
instructions to the other students. While she
carries herself like the perfect problem child, she
also seems strangely dependable.
